## Type of change

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run validate` passes (safety check + tests + build)
- [ ] Manual browser QA completed — describe below:

<!-- e.g. "Tested intro overlay on Chrome + Firefox, skip button works, replay button works" -->

## Safety checklist

- [ ] Submission contains no real-world targeting language
- [ ] No identifiable real person referenced in content or examples
- [ ] No persistent identity storage introduced
- [ ] No doxxing / harassment / threat patterns added
- [ ] `scripts/safety-check.mjs` passes with no blocked patterns
